caveats: Informational and educational only; not medical advice.
Does not diagnose disease or determine whether a person is infected.
Not a treatment recommendation or substitute for a healthcare professional.
Relative Maryland county-week Lyme baseline, not a per-bite infection probability.
Static seasonal prior; not a weather-adjusted forecast.
CDC national onset seasonality is not county-specific.
Surveillance/reporting changes and interventions are unmodeled.
Empirical intervals describe baseline uncertainty, not clinical confidence for an individual bite.
clinical_disclaimer: TickBiteRisk is for informational and educational purposes only. It is not medical advice, does not diagnose disease, and does not determine whether you are infected. Follow CDC guidance and contact a qualified healthcare professional about your situation.
method_summary: Selected annual model-comparison prediction rows apportioned by CDC national MMWR-week Lyme onset seasonality.
score_interpretation: Relative seasonal Lyme baseline on a 1-10 Maryland scale; not a per-bite infection probability.
